package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Educational Tour Package — Student Learning: Guwahati • Pobitora • Kaziranga National Park

highlights.text: Serial code AS-011 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-ED-AS011-2026
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: School Educational Tour
Destinations Covered: Guwahati • Kaziranga National Park • Pobitora
Ideal for: Student Groups, Academic Institutions, Researchers
Starting price: Student Group Concession (On Request)
Vehicle: Dedicated Luxury AC Coaches with certified safety features | Meal Plan: Full Board Academic Plan (APAI)
Route Plan: Guwahati ➔ Pobitora Ecology Briefing ➔ Kaziranga (2N) ➔ Guwahati Historical Survey (2N) ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Curated Note: Dedicated field guides, interactive worksheets, educational handbooks, and multi-point security coordination.
Curated by Experts: Learning exercises aligned with leading academic curricula.
Personalized Assistance: Support desks for faculty with student headcounts and medical needs.
Shopping: Orchid center organic remedies, bamboo handicraft centers, Guwahati book centers.
Important Notes: Follow safari safety guidelines; monitor plastic usage in Kaziranga; book 60 days ahead for concessions.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Educational Tour Package — Student Learning: Guwahati • Pobitora • Kaziranga National Park
itinerary.tagline: Educational Student Tour • Pobitora • Kaziranga • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Enlightening academic voyage combining rigorous learning modules with immersive experiences across Assam's biodiversity hotspots.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nEducational Assam Tour for academic excellence: Guwahati ➔ Pobitora ➔ Kaziranga (2N) ➔ Guwahati (2N) with luxury AC coaches and field research modules.

WHY PLAN AN EDUCATIONAL ASSAM TOUR?\nKaziranga rhino conservation, Brahmaputra hydro-geomorphology, bio-diversity research stations, and sustainable silk cultivation for student field excursions.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-011 | Educational Student Tour Pobitora Kaziranga | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Assam educational package (AS-011 / TG-ED-AS011-2026): Pobitora ecology, Kaziranga safari, tea estate study, science centre, Brahmaputra cruise.

highlights.text: Pobitora ecology briefing and grassland field session Day 01
Wetland survey and Kaziranga Orchid Park ethnobotanical mapping Day 02
Kaziranga jeep safari and tea plantation manufacturing study Day 03
Regional Science Centre and Brahmaputra hydro-geography cruise Day 04
Kamakhya architectural survey and academic certificate wrap-up Day 05

days.title: ARRIVAL IN GUWAHATI | FIELD BRIEFING & TRANSFER TO POBITORA ECO-ZONE
days.description: Student groups welcomed at Guwahati airport by TRAGUIN tour managers. Premium AC coach to Pobitora for interactive conservationist orientation on alluvial grasslands and rhino habitats.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Pobitora Buffer Zone, Wetland Observation Deck.
Learning Activity: Grassland Ecology Field Briefing and Q&A session.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Student Resort / Eco Lodge near Pobitora/Guwahati.

days.title: POBITORA TO KAZIRANGA | WETLAND SURVEY & ORCHID BIODIVERSITY CENTER
days.description: Early bird-watching and wetland survey then scenic drive to UNESCO Kaziranga. Visit Orchid and Cultural Park for ethnobotanical mapping and folk culture showcase.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kaziranga Orchid Park, Conservation Greenhouses.
Learning Activity: Ethnobotanical mapping and local folk culture showcase.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Eco-Resort in Kaziranga.

days.title: KAZIRANGA WILDLIFE SAFARI | MEGAMAMMAL CONSERVATION MODULE
days.description: Early open jeep safari observing rhinos, buffaloes, and birds. Afternoon tea processing estate study of economic geography and fair-trade labor models.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kaziranga National Park Jeep Safari, Tea Plantation Estate.
Learning Activity: Habitat observation logging and agricultural manufacturing study.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Eco-Resort in Kaziranga.

days.title: KAZIRANGA TO GUWAHATI | REGIONAL SCIENCE MUSEUM & BRAHMAPUTRA HYDROLOGY CRUISE
days.description: Regional Science Centre interactive galleries then exclusive educational Brahmaputra cruise lecture on river island formation and silt dynamics.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Regional Science Centre, Brahmaputra Educational Cruise.
Learning Activity: Hydro-geographic lecture and interactive science experiments.
Overnight Stay: Premium Hotel in Guwahati.

days.title: GUWAHATI HISTORICAL SURVEY | KAMAKHYA STUDIES & DEPARTURE
days.description: Kamakhya Temple compound architectural study, field notes wrap-up session, academic certificate distribution, and safe group airport transfer.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kamakhya Temple Complex, Archaeological view points.
Learning Activity: Final presentation and distribution of academic certificates.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Packed Box Lunch.

inclusions.text: Accommodation: Safe multi-share or twin room configurations across curated handpicked hotels.
Luxury Transportation: Entire itinerary via premium AC luxury coaches including fuel, driver allowances, and permits.
Hygienic Catering: All student-friendly meals (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner) included as listed.
Field Access: Open Jeep Safari permits for Kaziranga and standard entry tickets to all science centres.
Welcome Amenities: Student learning portfolios, custom clipboards, identification tags, and welcome stoles.
TRAGUIN Support: On-site student coordinators, first-aid kits, and real-time medical backup.
Travel Costs: Institutional airfare or train transit tickets to and from Guwahati.
Personal Media: Camera premium recording passes or drone use permits inside sanctuary zones.
Incidentals: Laundry, individual cold drinks, snacks, or extra souvenir shopping.
Unforeseen Overheads: Expenses from flight cancellations, bad weather, or sudden national holidays.
